portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Drakun — hunter guild master. scarred face and arms, green hood, piercing amber eyes, lean muscular build. Wearing forest ranger leather armor, green hooded cloak, quiver on back. Holding/carrying compound bow, hunting knife at thigh. Special details: multiple claw scars across face, wolf fang necklace. Expression: wild and primal. Set in Silvanhime region with ancient forest, spores, old growth atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
